mechanism: Because both continuation (doom loop risk) and correction (balance-sheet recession) are damaging, financial repression emerges as the path of least resistance. It is a slow, covert transfer from savers to government that avoids both acute crisis modes, explaining why 4/7 historical episodes resolved this way.
regime_dependence: Requires institutional capacity for stealth repression (regulatory captive buying via LCR, RBC, pension mandates) and political inability to achieve overt consolidation. Reserve-currency status provides additional runway.
